# Eitan Gorodetsky
> Operations Intelligence Architect specializing in business operations strategy, consulting, and insights

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://eitangorodetsky.com/): Introduction to Eitan Gorodetsky and his operations intelligence expertise
- [About Eitan Gorodetsky](https://eitangorodetsky.com/about): Professional background and experience in operations intelligence architecture
- [Operations Intelligence Architecture](https://eitangorodetsky.com/oia): Framework and methodology for operations intelligence
- [Work With Me](https://eitangorodetsky.com/work-with-me): Consulting services and engagement opportunities

## Stories & Insights
- [Stories](https://eitangorodetsky.com/stories): Collection of operational intelligence narratives and case studies
- [The Meeting After the Meeting](https://eitangorodetsky.com/stories/the-meeting-after-the-meeting): Story about hidden organizational dynamics
- [The Number Nobody Looks At](https://eitangorodetsky.com/stories/the-number-nobody-looks-at): Insights on overlooked operational metrics
- [The Vendor Who Knew Too Much](https://eitangorodetsky.com/stories/the-vendor-who-knew-too-much): Story about external operational perspectives
- [What the Dashboard Hides](https://eitangorodetsky.com/stories/what-the-dashboard-hides): Analysis of dashboard limitations and blind spots
